summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Zitex Shipping Features V2 (iteration 18) — all 19 new tests passed + all 13 regression tests passed (32 total). Verified 3 NEW revenue/UX features: (1) COD Markup - PUT config accepts cod_markup_enabled/cod_markup_sar, markup applies only when payment=cod AND provider supports_cod AND toggle on, order saved with cod_markup_applied field. (2) Shipping Insurance - PUT config accepts insurance_enabled/insurance_percent/insurance_min_sar, public quote returns insurance fields, insurance_fee computed as max(min_sar, subtotal*pct/100) when insurance_opted=true, fee=0 when opted=false or config disabled. (3) Shipment Tracking - PATCH /client/orders/{id} with tracking_number sets order.tracking_number, GET /public/{slug}/orders/my returns tracking_url derived from provider's tracking_url_template, tracking_url empty when no tracking_number or provider not in catalog.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed orders during testing (test orders created in cozy-cafe-demo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 shipping features V2 fully tested. Key features verified: (1) COD Markup: PUT /api/websites/projects/{id}/shipping/config accepts cod_markup_enabled (bool) and cod_markup_sar (float). When customer places order with shipping_provider that supports_cod AND payment_method='cod' AND cod_markup_enabled=true, server adds markup to delivery_fee. Does NOT apply when payment_method='stripe'. Order saved with cod_markup_applied field. (2) Shipping Insurance: PUT config accepts insurance_enabled, insurance_percent, insurance_min_sar. Public quote endpoint returns these fields. When insurance_opted=true, server computes max(min_sar, round(subtotal*pct/100, 2)). When insurance_opted=false (default), insurance_fee=0. When insurance_enabled=false in config, insurance_opted=true is ignored. (3) Tracking: PATCH /api/websites/client/orders/{order_id} with tracking_number sets order.tracking_number. GET /api/websites/public/{slug}/orders/my returns tracking_url derived from provider's tracking_url_template (e.g. SMSA: https://www.smsaexpress.com/sa/en/trackingdetails?tracknumbers={tracking}). tracking_url is empty when tracking_number is empty OR provider not in catalog. (4) Backwards compat: Orders without shipping_provider still work via legacy haversine path; orders without insurance_opted/cod fields still work. (5) All 13 previously-passing shipping tests from iteration 17 still pass.

test_classes: TestCODMarkupConfig (1 test) - PASSED: PUT config accepts cod_markup_enabled, cod_markup_sar
TestCODMarkupOrderCreation (3 tests) - PASSED: COD markup applies when payment=cod, does NOT apply when payment=stripe, order saved with cod_markup_applied field
TestInsuranceConfig (1 test) - PASSED: PUT config accepts insurance_enabled, insurance_percent, insurance_min_sar
TestInsurancePublicQuote (1 test) - PASSED: Public quote returns insurance fields
TestInsuranceOrderCreation (3 tests) - PASSED: insurance_opted=true computes fee, insurance_opted=false fee=0, insurance_enabled=false ignores opted=true
TestTrackingNumber (1 test) - PASSED: PATCH order sets tracking_number
TestTrackingURL (3 tests) - PASSED: orders/my returns tracking_url, empty when no tracking_number, empty when provider not in catalog
TestBackwardsCompatibility (2 tests) - PASSED: Legacy orders without shipping_provider work, orders without insurance_opted field work
TestRegressionPublicQuote (2 tests) - PASSED: Quote returns options, free shipping above threshold
TestRegressionDashboardConfig (1 test) - PASSED: GET shipping config works

backwards_compatibility.legacy_haversine: Working - orders without shipping_provider use haversine delivery calculation
backwards_compatibility.missing_fields: Orders without insurance_opted/cod fields work with defaults
